indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Concrete walls
indicators.rationale: Concrete walls are sturdy but may not be as visually appealing as other materials.

indicators.name: Rustic ceiling beams
indicators.rationale: Rustic ceiling beams add character to the space but may not be as functional as modern materials.

reasoning_summary: The space is suitable for computer work due to its large open area, but the rustic ceiling beams and concrete walls may not be as aesthetically pleasing as modern alternatives.
